_comment: Pi Agent Suite — Claude Code settings template.
_instructions: 1. Copy this file to ~/.claude/settings.json (or settings.local.json to merge with existing)
2. Replace all PI_HOME and PALACE placeholders with your actual install paths
or run the installer (installer/install.sh) to patch automatically.
3. Set MINIMAX_API_KEY in your environment (see config/env.template).
4. Replace OBSIDIAN_API_KEY with your Local REST API key from Obsidian.
5. Set OBSIDIAN_VAULT_NAME to the name of your vault as it appears in Obsidian.

hooks._note: On Windows, Git Bash must be on PATH. Or use WSL.

mempalace._note: Exposes 29 mempalace_* tools to Claude Code. Palace path = ~/.mempalace/palace by default.

minimax._note: MiniMax MCP — image gen, video gen, TTS, voice cloning, web search, image understanding. Get key from https://www.minimaxi.com/user-center/basic-information/interface-key

obsidian._note: Optional. Requires Obsidian + Local REST API plugin. Remove if not using Obsidian.
